name: BitSet32
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var s = BitSet32()
    s.set(0)
    s.set(3)
    s.set(31)
    print(Int(s.get(3)))
    print(Int(s.get(2)))
    print(s.count())
    s.clear(3)
    print(Int(s.get(3)))
    print(s.count())

name: Inventory
mojo_driver:
def main() raises:
    var inv = Inventory()
    inv.add("apple", 10)
    inv.add("banana", 5)
    inv.add("apple", 3)
    print(inv.get("apple"))
    inv.remove("banana", 2)
    print(inv.get("banana"))
    inv.remove("apple", 100)
    print(inv.get("apple"))
    print(inv.total())

name: Grid2D

name: Tally
mojo_driver:
def main() raises:
    var t = Tally()
    t.bump("a")
    t.bump("b")
    t.bump("a")
    t.bump("a")
    print(t.get("a"))
    print(t.get("b"))
    print(t.get("c"))
    print(t.distinct())
    print(t.totalCount())

name: Vec3
mojo_unit:
from std.math import sqrt

struct Vec3(Copyable, Movable):
    var x: Float64
    var y: Float64
    var z: Float64

    def __init__(out self, a: Float64, b: Float64, c: Float64):
        self.x = a
        self.y = b
        self.z = c

    def scale(mut self, s: Float64):
        self.x *= s
        self.y *= s
        self.z *= s

    def addv(mut self, o: Vec3):
        self.x += o.x
        self.y += o.y
        self.z += o.z

    def dot(self, o: Vec3) -> Float64:
        return self.x * o.x + self.y * o.y + self.z * o.z

    def length(self) -> Float64:
        return sqrt(self.x * self.x + self.y * self.y + self.z * self.z)

name: Timer
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var t = Timer()
    t.tick(3661)
    print(t.hours())
    print(t.minutes())
    print(t.secs())
    t.tick(7200)
    print(t.hours())
    t.reset()
    print(t.hours())

name: Graph4
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var g = Graph4()
    g.addEdge(0, 1)
    g.addEdge(1, 2)
    g.addEdge(0, 2)
    print(g.degree(0))
    print(g.degree(3))
    print(Int(g.connected(0, 1)))
    print(Int(g.connected(0, 3)))
    print(g.edgeCount())

name: Counter2
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var c = Counter2(10, 2)
    c.inc()
    c.inc()
    print(c.get())
    c.setStep(5)
    c.inc()
    print(c.get())
    c.dec()
    print(c.get())

name: RunningProduct
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var rp = RunningProduct()
    rp.multiply(2.0)
    rp.multiply(8.0)
    print(rp.value())
    print(rp.geometricMean())
    rp.multiply(4.0)
    print(rp.value())
    print(rp.geometricMean())
